ABRASIVE.name: Abrasive
ABRASIVE.description: Rub people the wrong way without even trying. Blunt and socially 'spiky'.

ABSTAINER.name: Abstainer
ABSTAINER.description: Strictly avoids the party scene and vices. Seen as the 'clean' member of the group.

ACADEMIC.name: Academic
ACADEMIC.description: The straight-A student who left a scholarship behind for a shot at the spotlight.

ADAPTABLE.name: Adaptable
ADAPTABLE.description: Goes with the flow. Can fit into any group dynamic or concept without complaint.

ADVENTUROUS.name: Adventurous
ADVENTUROUS.description: Always the first to try a new stunt or challenge. High energy and fearless.

ADVOCATE.name: Advocate
ADVOCATE.description: Sticks up for the underdogs in the competition. Highly empathetic and vocal.

AGITATOR.name: Agitator
AGITATOR.description: Loves to stir the pot and watch the drama unfold. A producer's best friend.

ALPHA.name: Alpha
ALPHA.description: Natural dominant leader. Takes up space and demands attention in every room.

AMBITIOUS.name: Ambitious
AMBITIOUS.description: Will do whatever it takes to reach the center spot. Focused entirely on the win.

ANTAGONISTIC.name: Antagonistic
ANTAGONISTIC.description: Naturally argumentative. Seems to pick fights just to keep things interesting.

ANXIOUS.name: Anxious
ANXIOUS.description: Constantly worried about rankings and mistakes. Makes for a sympathetic edit.

ARBITER.name: Arbiter
ARBITER.description: The peacekeeper who settles dorm disputes. Keeps the group functional.

ASSERTIVE.name: Assertive
ASSERTIVE.description: Clear and direct about their needs and opinions without being aggressive.

ATHLETIC.name: Athletic
ATHLETIC.description: The 'Jock' archetype. Masculine, powerful, and physically dominant on stage.

AVOIDANT.name: Avoidant
AVOIDANT.description: Disappears when conflict arises. Hard to pin down for serious discussions.

BLABBER.name: Blabber
BLABBER.description: Can't keep a secret. Tells the cameras everything that happened in the dorm.

BLUNT.name: Blunt
BLUNT.description: Total honesty, often at the expense of the team's feelings. The one who 'tells it like it is'.

BOHEMIAN.name: Bohemian
BOHEMIAN.description: A 'hippie' vibe. They value artistic freedom over scores and rankings.

BORING.name: Boring
BORING.description: Nice enough, but provides zero 'hooks' for the cameras. A nightmare for editors.

BUBBLY.name: Bubbly
BUBBLY.description: Infectious energy. Always smiling, even during 4 AM rehearsals.

BULLY.name: Bully
BULLY.description: Uses their status to intimidate weaker contestants. The definitive season villain.

CALCULATED.name: Calculated
CALCULATED.description: Every move, every smile, and every tear is pre-planned for the cameras.

CALM.name: Calm
CALM.description: Nothing rattles them. A stabilizing force during high-stress eliminations.

CAREFREE.name: Carefree
CAREFREE.description: The stress of the competition simply doesn't reach them. Living in the moment.

CHAMELEON.name: Chameleon
CHAMELEON.description: Adapts their personality, tone, and opinions to match whoever they are currently talking to. Extremely likeable in person, but appears inauthentic on camera.

CHAMPION.name: Champion
CHAMPION.description: Has a 'winner's aura'. They excel under pressure and carry the team.

CHARMER.name: Charmer
CHARMER.description: Could sell ice to an Eskimo. Extremely persuasive and likable.

CLUMSY.name: Clumsy
CLUMSY.description: Trips over thin air but does it endearingly. The 'accidental' variety star.

COCKY.name: Cocky
COCKY.description: Overconfident to a fault. Loves to brag about their skills before they even perform.

COMPLAINER.name: Complainer
COMPLAINER.description: Always find something wrong—the food, the dorms, the choreography.

CONSERVATIVE.name: Conservative
CONSERVATIVE.description: Prefers traditional methods and modest styling. Resists radical changes.

CONVENTIONAL.name: Conventional
CONVENTIONAL.description: Fits the standard boy-band mold perfectly. Safe, reliable, and predictable.

COOPERATIVE.name: Cooperative
COOPERATIVE.description: The ultimate team player. Follows instructions to the letter.

COUNSELOR.name: Counselor
COUNSELOR.description: Spends their free time listening to other trainees' problems.

CREATIVE.name: Creative
CREATIVE.description: Always suggesting new arrangements and concepts. An artist at heart.

CURIOUS.name: Curious
CURIOUS.description: Wants to know how everything works, from the cameras to the soundboard.

CYNICAL.name: Cynical
CYNICAL.description: Expects the worst from the industry and the producers.

DECEITFUL.name: Deceitful
DECEITFUL.description: Will lie to peers to gain a competitive advantage. Highly untrustworthy.

DECEIVER.name: Deceiver
DECEIVER.description: Expert at hiding their true feelings. You never know what they're really thinking.

DEEP.name: Deep
DEEP.description: Always looking for the 'meaning' behind the lyrics. Intense and philosophical.

DEFENDER.name: Defender
DEFENDER.description: Will confront anyone who treats their friends poorly.

DEFIANT.name: Defiant
DEFIANT.description: The first to say 'No' to a mentor. They refuse to be 'manufactured'.

DELUSIONAL.name: Delusional
DELUSIONAL.description: Genuinely believes they are the best despite getting 'F' grades. Great for TV.

DILIGENT.name: Diligent
DILIGENT.description: The first one in the studio and the last one out. Pure effort.

DIPLOMAT.name: Diplomat
DIPLOMAT.description: Highly skilled at navigating company politics and group dynamics.

DISORGANIZED.name: Disorganized
DISORGANIZED.description: Loses their lyric sheets and misses rehearsal times. A mess in the dorms.

DISSENTER.name: Dissenter
DISSENTER.description: The one who always says 'no' to the group's majority decision.

DOWN_TO_EARTH.name: Down-to-earth
DOWN_TO_EARTH.description: Relatable and humble. Feels like someone you’d know in real life.

DOWNER.name: Downer
DOWNER.description: Focuses only on the negatives. Drains the energy of the room.

DUMB.name: Dumb
DUMB.description: Slow on the uptake, but usually harmless. Often the butt of the joke.

ECCENTRIC.name: Eccentric
ECCENTRIC.description: Has strange hobbies and a unique way of speaking. Totally original.

ELOQUENT.name: Eloquent
ELOQUENT.description: Extremely well-spoken. Always gives the best speeches during awards.

ENIGMATIC.name: Enigmatic
ENIGMATIC.description: Quiet and mysterious. The fans spend all their time trying to figure them out.

ENTHUSIASTIC.name: Enthusiastic
ENTHUSIASTIC.description: Always at a level 10 energy. They genuinely love every terrible rehearsal and early morning.

ENVIOUS.name: Envious
ENVIOUS.description: Secretly resents the more popular members of the competition.

EXPRESSIVE.name: Expressive
EXPRESSIVE.description: Their face is an open book. Every emotion is broadcast at 100% volume.

EXTRAVAGANT.name: Extravagant
EXTRAVAGANT.description: Flashy, loud, and expensive. Loves to be the center of attention.

EXTROVERTED.name: Extroverted
EXTROVERTED.description: Energized by people. Always the life of the party.

FAIR.name: Fair
FAIR.description: Values justice and equal distribution of lines and screen time.

FASTIDIOUS.name: Fastidious
FASTIDIOUS.description: Incredibly attentive to detail, often to the point of annoying their teammates.

FATALIST.name: Fatalist
FATALIST.description: Believes their destiny is already written. 'If I get cut, it was meant to be.'

FEARLESS.name: Fearless
FEARLESS.description: Takes massive risks on stage. No fear of failure or embarrassment.

FEMININE.name: Feminine
FEMININE.description: A softer, more delicate aesthetic. Breaks traditional boy-band masculinity.

FLAMBOYANT.name: Flamboyant
FLAMBOYANT.description: Loud, colorful, and impossible to ignore. They bring a 'parade' energy to the stage.

FLIRTATIOUS.name: Flirtatious
FLIRTATIOUS.description: Constantly winking at cameras and teasing the fans. A natural charmer.

FOCUSED.name: Focused
FOCUSED.description: Has blinders on. Ignores the drama to focus entirely on the performance.

FOOLISH.name: Foolish
FOOLISH.description: Makes impulsive, ill-advised decisions that often blow up in their face.

FORGIVING.name: Forgiving
FORGIVING.description: Easily lets go of grudges after a betrayal or argument.

FREE_SPIRIT.name: Free Spirit
FREE_SPIRIT.description: Hates rules and hierarchy. Lives life on their own terms.

FRUGAL.name: Frugal
FRUGAL.description: Hates waste. Will scold other members for leaving lights on or wasting dorm food.

FUN_LOVING.name: Fun-loving
FUN_LOVING.description: Wants to enjoy every moment. Makes rehearsals feel like a party.

GENTLE.name: Gentle
GENTLE.description: Soft-spoken and kind. Wouldn't hurt a fly.

GOOFY.name: Goofy
GOOFY.description: Makes silly faces and jokes. The group's primary source of comic relief.

GREEDY.name: Greedy
GREEDY.description: Always pushing for more lines, more screen time, and more center spots.

GRITTY.name: Gritty
GRITTY.description: An 'unpolished' and raw talent. They bring a real-world toughness to the group.

GUARDIAN.name: Guardian
GUARDIAN.description: Takes care of the younger members' health and well-being.

HARD_WORKING.name: Hard-working
HARD_WORKING.description: Rarely sleeps. Dedicated to perfecting every detail.

HARDENED.name: Hardened
HARDENED.description: Has seen the ugly side of the industry. Not here for games or friendships.

HATER.name: Hater
HATER.description: Always has something negative to say about others' successes.

HEARTTHROB.name: Heartthrob
HEARTTHROB.description: Possesses an innate, effortless charm that makes girls scream and producers take notice.

HERETIC.name: Heretic
HERETIC.description: Frequently challenges the company's traditional training methods.

HERMIT.name: Hermit
HERMIT.description: Stays in their bunk or the studio. Avoids social interactions entirely.

HONEST.name: Honest
HONEST.description: Incapable of lying, even if it hurts the group's public image.

HONORABLE.name: Honorable
HONORABLE.description: Sticks to a strict moral code, even when it’s not competitive to do so.

HUMBLE.name: Humble
HUMBLE.description: Downplays their own talent. Grateful for even the smallest wins.

HYPOCRITICAL.name: Hypocritical
HYPOCRITICAL.description: Demands discipline from others but is lazy themselves. High drama trigger.

IMPULSIVE.name: Impulsive
IMPULSIVE.description: Acts first, thinks later. Keeps the show's producers on their toes.

INDIVIDUALIST.name: Individualist
INDIVIDUALIST.description: Cares more about their personal brand than the group's success.

INNOCENT.name: Innocent
INNOCENT.description: Naive about the world and the industry. Needs constant protection.

INSECURE.name: Insecure
INSECURE.description: Constantly fishing for compliments and reassurance from judges.

INTELLIGENT.name: Intelligent
INTELLIGENT.description: Quick to understand concepts and strategies. Very logical.

INTENSE.name: Intense
INTENSE.description: Everything is life or death. Their gaze alone can be overwhelming.

INTROVERTED.name: Introverted
INTROVERTED.description: Quiet and reserved. Recharges by being alone.

IRRESPONSIBLE.name: Irresponsible
IRRESPONSIBLE.description: Forgetful and reckless with equipment and schedules.

JEALOUS.name: Jealous
JEALOUS.description: Can't stand to see others get the spotlight. Highly reactive.

JOKESTER.name: Jokester
JOKESTER.description: Always pulling pranks on the other trainees.

JUST.name: Just
JUST.description: Highly principled. Will call out unfair treatment, even by staff.

KIND.name: Kind
KIND.description: Naturally warm and welcoming to everyone.

LAZY.name: Lazy
LAZY.description: The one sleeping in the dance studio corner while others work.

LEGACY.name: Legacy
LEGACY.description: The child of a former star or industry titan. They carry a heavy name and an even heavier expectation to succeed.

LONER.name: Loner
LONER.description: Does not participate in group activities unless forced.

LUNATIC.name: Lunatic
LUNATIC.description: Unfiltered and chaotic. Their interviews are legendary for being insane.

MACHO.name: Macho
MACHO.description: Hyper-masculine and aggressive. Over-compensates to look tough.

MANIAC.name: Maniac
MANIAC.description: Possessed by an overwhelming, almost frightening energy on stage.

MANIPULATIVE.name: Manipulative
MANIPULATIVE.description: Master at playing people against each other for their own benefit.

MAVERICK.name: Maverick
MAVERICK.description: Refuses to stick to the script. An unpredictable performer who defies the 'manufactured' idol mold.

MEDIATOR.name: Mediator
MEDIATOR.description: Naturally gifted at finding common ground in an argument.

MEEK.name: Meek
MEEK.description: Easily overshadowed. They tend to apologize for taking up space.

MELODRAMATIC.name: Melodramatic
MELODRAMATIC.description: Turns every minor inconvenience into a Shakespearian tragedy. High screen time.

MERCENARY.name: Mercenary
MERCENARY.description: They aren't here for 'the dream' or 'the music'—they are here for the paycheck and the fame.

MESSY.name: Messy
MESSY.description: Leaves a trail of clothes and trash everywhere. A primary cause of dorm arguments.

MISCREANT.name: Miscreant
MISCREANT.description: A troublemaker who refuses to follow any company policy.

MISFIT.name: Misfit
MISFIT.description: Doesn't quite fit the 'idol' image, making them an underdog favorite.

MODEST.name: Modest
MODEST.description: Shies away from praise. Genuine and unassuming.

NARCISSIST.name: Narcissist
NARCISSIST.description: Obsessed with their own reflection and fame. Truly loves themselves.

NARROW_MINDED.name: Narrow-minded
NARROW_MINDED.description: Stubborn and unwilling to listen to new ideas or alternative views.

NEUROTIC.name: Neurotic
NEUROTIC.description: Anxious, obsessive, and easily stressed by small changes.

NONCHALANT.name: Nonchalant
NONCHALANT.description: Acts like they happened to walk onto the set by accident. Too cool for the competition.

NURTURING.name: Nurturing
NURTURING.description: Always making sure everyone else is fed and rested.

OBNOXIOUS.name: Obnoxious
OBNOXIOUS.description: Loud, grating, and has zero social awareness.

OBSESSIVE.name: Obsessive
OBSESSIVE.description: Will repeat a single dance move for five hours straight.

OPENLY_BI.name: Openly bi
OPENLY_BI.description: Authentic and open about their bisexuality, creating a loyal niche fanbase.

OPENLY_GAY.name: Openly gay
OPENLY_GAY.description: Courageously open about their sexuality in a high-stakes environment.

OPENLY_TRANS.name: Openly trans
OPENLY_TRANS.description: A trailblazing identity that brings intense national conversation and support.

OPINIONATED.name: Opinionated
OPINIONATED.description: Has a strong view on everything and is never afraid to share it loudly.

OPTIMIST.name: Optimist
OPTIMIST.description: Always believes the next mission will be their big break.

ORGANIZED.name: Organized
ORGANIZED.description: Keeps the group schedule and the dorm perfectly tidy.

PASSIVE.name: Passive
PASSIVE.description: Hardly ever speaks up. Lets others make all the decisions.

PATIENT.name: Patient
PATIENT.description: Willing to wait for their moment. Never complains about small roles.

PERFECTIONIST.name: Perfectionist
PERFECTIONIST.description: Distraught by even the smallest mistake in a performance.

PESSIMIST.name: Pessimist
PESSIMIST.description: Sure they’re going to be eliminated every single week.

PRANKSTER.name: Prankster
PRANKSTER.description: The group's little brother energy. Loves a good prank and keeps the tour bus lively.

PREJUDICED.name: Prejudiced
PREJUDICED.description: Holds unfair biases against others. A deeply controversial contestant.

PREPPY.name: Preppy
PREPPY.description: The 'Clean-Cut' visual. Polished, well-dressed, and fits the classic boy-band aesthetic.

PRETENTIOUS.name: Pretentious
PRETENTIOUS.description: Acts like they are above 'pop' music and 'idol' culture.

PRODIGY.name: Prodigy
PRODIGY.description: A natural talent who picks up skills instantly, though often acts like they don't have to try.

PROMISCUOUS.name: Promiscuous
PROMISCUOUS.description: The 'Player'. Known for chasing staff or other contestants off-camera.

PROTECTOR.name: Protector
PROTECTOR.description: The group's 'Big Brother'. Shields others from harsh criticism.

PROUD.name: Proud
PROUD.description: Refuses to admit when they are wrong or need help.

PROVOCATIVE.name: Provocative
PROVOCATIVE.description: Knows exactly what to say to get a reaction. Constantly testing boundaries.

QUIRKY.name: Quirky
QUIRKY.description: Unpredictable, eccentric, and lives in their own world. Reality TV gold for being 'random'.

RADICAL.name: Radical
RADICAL.description: Wants to completely change the group's direction or style.

REBEL.name: Rebel
REBEL.description: Constantly breaks the curfew and ignores the rules.

RECKLESS.name: Reckless
RECKLESS.description: Doesn't care about the consequences of their actions on the team.

RECLUSE.name: Recluse
RECLUSE.description: Only leaves their room to perform. A ghost in the dorms.

RELAXED.name: Relaxed
RELAXED.description: Never feels the pressure, even in the finale.

RENEGADE.name: Renegade
RENEGADE.description: Goes against the company and the show's script entirely.

RESERVED.name: Reserved
RESERVED.description: Highly professional but keeps their personal life private.

RESIGNED.name: Resigned
RESIGNED.description: Has lost their fire. They are just going through the motions until they get cut.

RESOURCEFUL.name: Resourceful
RESOURCEFUL.description: Can make a high-end performance outfit out of dorm curtains. Clever and handy.

ROBOTIC.name: Robotic
ROBOTIC.description: Completely devoid of visible emotion. They execute every command with terrifying precision but lack human warmth.

ROUGH.name: Rough
ROUGH.description: Unpolished and aggressive. Needs a lot of refinement.

SAD.name: Sad
SAD.description: Always seems to be on the verge of tears. The 'tragic' contestant.

SAVANT.name: Savant
SAVANT.description: Possesses a genius-level mastery of one specific skill but struggles with basic social cues and group cohesion.

SECURE.name: Secure
SECURE.description: Confident in their spot. Doesn't feel threatened by new talent.

SELF_CENTERED.name: Self-centered
SELF_CENTERED.description: Only cares about how things affect them personally.

SELF_DEPRECATING.name: Self-deprecating
SELF_DEPRECATING.description: Wins the audience over by being the first to joke about their own flaws.

SELFISH.name: Selfish
SELFISH.description: Will hog resources or food without thinking of the group.

SENSITIVE.name: Sensitive
SENSITIVE.description: Easily hurt by criticism from the judges or mentors.

SENSUAL.name: Sensual
SENSUAL.description: Known for their 'sexy' aura and seductive stage presence.

SENTIMENTAL.name: Sentimental
SENTIMENTAL.description: Keeps every fan letter and gift. Cries at every elimination.

SHALLOW.name: Shallow
SHALLOW.description: Cares only about the outfit, the makeup, and how many followers they are gaining.

SHELTERED.name: Sheltered
SHELTERED.description: Has lived a very protected life. The real world (and reality TV) is a huge shock.

SHOW_OFF.name: Show-off
SHOW_OFF.description: Can't stand a moment where they aren't the center of attention. High energy, low modesty.

SHY.name: Shy
SHY.description: Terrified of the cameras. Needs a lot of coaxing to speak.

SKEPTIC.name: Skeptic
SKEPTIC.description: Doesn't trust the results or the judges' feedback.

SOCIAL.name: Social
SOCIAL.description: Everyone’s best friend. Knows every trainee by name.

SOCIOPATH.name: Sociopath
SOCIOPATH.description: Incapable of empathy. Sees everyone as a tool for their success.

SOULFUL.name: Soulful
SOULFUL.description: A deep, emotional resonance in their presence and performance.

SPIRITUAL.name: Spiritual
SPIRITUAL.description: Uses meditation or faith to handle the stress of the competition.

STOIC.name: Stoic
STOIC.description: The 'mysterious one' of the group. Composed, cool, and difficult to read.

STUBBORN.name: Stubborn
STUBBORN.description: Refuses to change their style, even when told by experts.

SUBSERVIENT.name: Subservient
SUBSERVIENT.description: Will do whatever the 'Alpha' members say without question.

SUBTLE.name: Subtle
SUBTLE.description: They don't shout to be heard. They have a quiet, understated magnetism.

SYCOPHANT.name: Sycophant
SYCOPHANT.description: A 'yes-man' to the judges and the most popular contestants. Strategic flattery.

TACTICIAN.name: Tactician
TACTICIAN.description: Views the other contestants as chess pieces. Always calculating the 'win'.

TASK_ORIENTED.name: Task-oriented
TASK_ORIENTED.description: Only cares about the check-list. No time for small talk or drama.

TENACIOUS.name: Tenacious
TENACIOUS.description: The underdog who won't quit. Driven by a 'refuse to lose' American dream mentality.

THEATRICAL.name: Theatrical
THEATRICAL.description: Every gesture is grand and dramatic. They perform even when the cameras aren't rolling.

THICK_SKINNED.name: Thick-skinned
THICK_SKINNED.description: Ignores the hate comments and harsh judge critiques entirely.

TOO_NICE.name: Too nice
TOO_NICE.description: Will give up their center spot just because someone else asked for it.

TRUTH_SEEKER.name: Truth Seeker
TRUTH_SEEKER.description: Constantly trying to figure out who is 'real' and who is fake.

TRY_HARD.name: Try-hard
TRY_HARD.description: Their desperation for success is visible. Some find it inspiring; others find it 'cringe'.

UNCONVENTIONAL.name: Unconventional
UNCONVENTIONAL.description: Does everything in a way the producers have never seen before.

UNFLAPPABLE.name: Unflappable
UNFLAPPABLE.description: Possesses a 'Zen-like' calm. Judges can't seem to break them with harsh critiques.

UNYIELDING.name: Unyielding
UNYIELDING.description: A 'mountain' of a personality. They do not compromise, even if it helps the group.

VAGABOND.name: Vagabond
VAGABOND.description: Has no 'home' group. Drifts between different social circles.

VEGAN.name: Vegan
VEGAN.description: Strongly committed to their lifestyle, even during grueling tours.

VETERAN.name: Veteran
VETERAN.description: Has been trying to make it in the industry for years. Professional and slightly jaded.

VILLAIN.name: Villain
VILLAIN.description: Embraces the role of the antagonist. Loves to be hated.

VOLATILE.name: Volatile
VOLATILE.description: Wears their heart on their sleeve. Prone to explosive growth and high-stakes drama.

WARDEN.name: Warden
WARDEN.description: Strictly enforces the dorm rules and company schedules on others.

WHIMSICAL.name: Whimsical
WHIMSICAL.description: Prone to sudden changes of heart and playful, odd behavior. Hard to predict.

WITHDRAWN.name: Withdrawn
WITHDRAWN.description: Shuts down emotionally when under stress or criticism.

WITTY.name: Witty
WITTY.description: Sharp-tongued and quick with a joke. The go-to guy for interview soundbites.

WORKAHOLIC.name: Workaholic
WORKAHOLIC.description: Physical health is secondary to the performance. Always practicing.

WORLDLY.name: Worldly
WORLDLY.description: Has traveled and experienced much. Nothing in the competition surprises them.

WORRYWART.name: Worrywart
WORRYWART.description: Stresses about things that haven't even happened yet.
